engineManufacturers.name: Mercedes-AMG F1
engineManufacturers.desc: The benchmark hybrid architecture. Exceptional ERS and top-end power.

engineManufacturers.name: Ferrari
engineManufacturers.desc: Raw power leader. Slightly less refined ERS than the silver works engine but devastating on power tracks.

engineManufacturers.name: Honda
engineManufacturers.desc: Exclusive works deal with the British racing-green outfit. Strong hybrid efficiency and compact packaging.

engineManufacturers.name: Renault E-Tech
engineManufacturers.desc: A new works powertrain programme with external manufacturer support. High-upside engine for Milton Keynes Racing and Toro GP.

td.name: Pierre Waché
td.desc: A brilliant aerodynamicist who masters the entire technical design of the grids most efficient aerodynamic concepts.

td.name: Loïc Serra
td.desc: Bringing elite vehicle dynamics expertise straight from Mercedes to spearhead Scuderia Ferraris 2026 engine era.

td.name: James Allison
td.desc: A legendary engineering director known for cultivating championship-winning cultures and dominant technical platforms.

td.name: Rob Marshall
td.desc: A veteran design expert whose recent transition from Red Bull has catalyzed McLarens rapid rise to the front.

td.name: Enrico Cardile
td.desc: A high-profile signing from Ferrari tasked with turning Aston Martins massive infrastructure into immediate title contention.

td.name: David Sanchez
td.desc: An experienced aerodynamic specialist working hard to structurally rebuild and streamline Alpines engineering departments.

td.name: Pat Fry
td.desc: A calm, highly respected technical veteran focused on bringing modern engineering processes back to Grove.

td.name: Jody Egginton
td.desc: A pragmatic technical leader skilled at maximizing performance within a tight, collaborative sister-team framework.

td.name: Andrea de Zordo
td.desc: A sharp design engineer tasked with optimizing the close technical partnership between Haas and Dallara/Ferrari.

td.name: James Key
td.desc: Tasked with transitioning the Hinwil-based squad into a full Audi works operation using his vast midfield expertise.

td.name: Nick Chester
td.desc: A proven F1 veteran leading the technical foundation of the American outfits ambitious entry into the sport.

rs.name: Hannah Schmitz
rs.desc: Celebrated as the gold standard of F1 strategy, famous for making cold, championship-winning calls under extreme pressure.

rs.name: Ravin Jain
rs.desc: A brilliant young mathematical mind bringing analytical precision to calm Ferraris historically chaotic strategy calls.

rs.name: Rosie Wait
rs.desc: Leverages complex simulation models to master game-theory execution from the Brackley race support room.

rs.name: Randy Singh
rs.desc: A foundational element of McLaren’s trackside brain trust, blending software innovations with lightning-fast intuition.

rs.name: Tom McCullough
rs.desc: A calm trackside engineering director who coordinates race strategy with an emphasis on safe, high-yield points scoring.

rs.name: Matthieu Dubois
rs.desc: A calculating strategist working aggressively to find creative, high-risk alternatives for a recovering midfield team.

rs.name: James Matthews
rs.desc: Utilizes a highly adaptive, data-driven approach to consistently maximize points opportunities during chaotic race weekends.

rs.name: Marco Perrone
rs.desc: Specializes in aggressive undercuts and tire management strategies tailored perfectly to the tight midfield battle.

rs.name: Maurizio Bocchi
rs.desc: Focuses on defensive, point-securing strategy matrices designed to convert strong qualifying results into concrete finishes.

rs.name: Marcus Vance
rs.desc: An ambitious new analytical recruit brought in to establish world-class strategy software for the Audi works program.

rs.name: Sarah Jenkins
rs.desc: A sharp American strategist utilizing modern sports analytics to give the grids newest team an immediate tactical edge.

cm.name: Phil Turner
cm.desc: Demands perfection in the garage to ensure the teams machinery remains the most bulletproof and reliable on the grid.

cm.name: Francesco Cigarini
cm.desc: A highly respected garage leader who commands absolute focus and precision from the Maranello mechanics.

cm.name: Matt Deane
cm.desc: Ensures exceptional standards of car assembly and structural reliability through meticulous, military-style garage organization.

cm.name: Kari Lammenranta
cm.desc: A calm and methodical veteran mechanic who anchors the garage during intense, high-stress build periods.

cm.name: Dale Furniss
cm.desc: Oversees a massive influx of team resources to ensure flawless car reliability and preparation standards.

cm.name: Jason Milligan
cm.desc: A hard-working veteran focused on minimizing mechanical failures and optimizing rapid power-unit changes.

cm.name: Mark Pattinson
cm.desc: Renowned for his ability to completely rebuild heavily damaged cars overnight with flawless attention to detail.

cm.name: Mick Price
cm.desc: A steady hand in the garage who ensures seamless execution and reliability across both sides of the VCARB pit.

cm.name: Toby Brown
cm.desc: Maximizes limited personnel resources to keep the Haas cars meticulously prepared and strictly on schedule.

cm.name: Reto Camenzind
cm.desc: Spearheading the massive upgrade in garage equipment and technical standards for the factory Audi entry.

cm.name: Derek Vance
cm.desc: Tasked with building a cohesive garage team from scratch and establishing elite standards of mechanical preparation.

pcc.name: Sam OGorman
pcc.desc: Oversees the most feared pit crew in history, consistently drilling them to hit sub-two-second pit stops.

pcc.name: Diego Ioverno
pcc.desc: Focuses heavily on synchronization and physical conditioning to keep Ferraris stops consistently in the elite bracket.

pcc.name: Rob Meadows
pcc.desc: A strict operational veteran who prioritizes safety and absolute consistency over risky, uncalculated speed.

pcc.name: Paul James
pcc.desc: Led the crew to historic, record-breaking pit stop times through relentless biomechanical optimizations.

pcc.name: Andy Stevenson
pcc.desc: A long-standing operational leader bringing sharp tactical awareness to pitlane coordination and safe releases.

pcc.name: Julian Rouse
pcc.desc: Drills the crew relentlessly to improve consistency and shave off critical tenths in a hyper-competitive midfield.

pcc.name: Sven Smeets
pcc.desc: Focuses heavily on psychological composure to prevent mistakes during high-stakes pit stop windows.

pcc.name: Alan Permane
pcc.desc: A ruthless operational perfectionist who demands flawless, rapid tire changes under any track conditions.

pcc.name: Peter Crolla
pcc.desc: Focuses on minimizing costly errors to ensure the crew delivers reliable, steady stops every Sunday.

pcc.name: Beat Zehnder
pcc.desc: A legendary paddock figure bringing decades of operational mastery to steady the new Audi crews execution.

pcc.name: Rob Edwards
pcc.desc: Adapting American open-wheel pit efficiency models to forge a fast, highly disciplined F1 crew.
